name: studio.update_redirect
description: Update an existing URL redirect on an Actium Studio site: change destination, status code, or source path.
whenToUse: Destination page moved again — point the existing redirect at the new URL rather than creating a chained redirect.
Upgrade a temporary 302 to a permanent 301 once the destination is confirmed stable.
Fix a typo in a recently-created redirect's destination before it receives significant traffic.
whenNotToUse: Redirect does not yet exist — use studio.create_redirect; updating a non-existent id returns 404.
Caller wants to move all redirects to a new destination — batch client-side; no bulk-update endpoint is exposed in this skill.
Change would introduce a redirect loop — pre-validate before calling; server rejects loops with 400.
